flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Phoenix-Arizona rose 768% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 1.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Phoenix-Arizona fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Phoenix-Arizona rose 52% between 2021 and 2024 (13.7% → 20.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Phoenix-Arizona rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 (63.7k → 86.0k).
